idle: standing still, slight sway, breathing in
standing still, slight sway, breathing out, arm lifted 1 pixel
standing still, slight sway, shoulders settle 1 pixel lower
standing still, slight sway, breathing in again, near frame 1 but hair tip offset 1 pixel
walk: left foot forward, right arm forward
mid stride, passing pose, both feet near-center
right foot forward, left arm forward
mid stride, passing pose, opposite arm forward
left foot forward again, slight bob down 1 pixel
mid stride, returning to frame 1 pose

negative_prompt: different character, different hairstyle, different outfit, different palette, blurry, smooth shading, anti-aliased, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
positive_prompt_suffix: crisp pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, uniform pixel grid, limited palette, transparent background
